response:
Based on the provided text, Chancellor Otto von Bismarck and the Reichstadt Agreement were both part of the **League of the Three Emperors** (also known as the *Dreikaiserbund* or *Dreikaiserabkommen*).

The text explicitly states in the "Reichstadt Agreement" section that the agreement was made between Austria-Hungary and Russia "who were at that time in an alliance with each other and Germany in the League of the Three Emperors." Additionally, the "League of the Three Emperors" section confirms that Chancellor Otto von Bismarck formed this alliance in 1873.
